changelog: Side menu (FIXED PROPERLY): Pressing LEFT from any card on any home page now lands focus on Home — every single time, regardless of which card you came from. The previous fix relied on focusProperties.enter which only fires for moveFocus() calls; this build adds a runtime onFocusChanged-based cold-entry redirect that catches every focus path including direct requestFocus and 2D spatial-search.

Player exit prompt (FIXED): The "Are you done watching?" dialog now correctly traps D-pad navigation. You can move LEFT/RIGHT between Yes/No buttons and the player no longer steals key presses behind the dialog. Wrapped in a proper Compose Dialog with its own input window — same pattern as the long-press Remove confirmation. Code now has a DO-NOT-REGRESS comment block above the dialog to ensure future prompts use the same Dialog pattern.
Continue Watching: All v1.44.42 features still in place — Are-you-done prompt, Clear All, tombstone deletion, 14-day prune, auto-focus first CW tile.
